title.purpose: App name in the header, page titles, modal headings.

body.purpose: Message content (rendered markdown), inputs, the chat textarea.

ui.purpose: Default control text: buttons, list rows, connection meta.

meta.purpose: Timestamps, hints, harness panel helper lines. 12px floor.

mono.purpose: Literal copy/paste strings only: tokens, URLs, cwd paths, tool JSON.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: The standalone Login card floating on an empty screen (shadow-sm).

shadows.name: drawer
shadows.purpose: The mobile slide-in nav drawer (shadow-lg); flat/docked at md+.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Permission and New Chat dialogs, the highest layer (shadow-xl).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-intent action: send, create, save, the empty-state CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font: 500 0.875rem/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #60a5fa; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Cancel, close, Settings, copy, Browse. Quiet, bordered, never competes with primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #fff; color: #374151; font: 400 0.875rem/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f3f4f6; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #60a5fa; }

components.name: Stop / Danger Button
components.description: The in-flight Stop button; also the model for destructive confirm actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #dc2626; color: #fff; font: 500 0.875rem/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #b91c1c; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #f87171; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Token / name / URL / cwd fields. Mono variant for copy/paste strings; password for secrets.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="วาง token ที่นี่" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #fff; color: #111827; font: 400 1rem/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #60a5fa; border-color: transparent; }

components.name: User Message Bubble
components.description: The operator's own turn: solid blue, right-aligned, capped width.
components.html: รันเทสต์ให้หน่อย
components.css: .ds-msg-user { max-width: 88%; margin-left: auto; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 1rem; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font: 400 1rem/1.6 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; word-break: break-word; }

components.name: Assistant Message Bubble
components.description: Claude's turn: sunken neutral, ink text, left-aligned, rendered markdown.
components.html: เรียบร้อย เทสต์ผ่าน 348/348
components.css: .ds-msg-assistant { max-width: 88%; margin-right: auto; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 1rem; background: #f3f4f6; color: #111827; font: 400 1rem/1.6 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; word-break: break-word; }

components.name: Tool Card
components.description: Inline amber card when the local-agent calls a tool. Amber = the machine is acting.
components.css: .ds-tool-card { margin: 0.25rem 0; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #fcd34d; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: #fffbeb; font-size: 0.75rem; } .ds-tool-name { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #92400e; } .ds-tool-args { margin: 0.25rem 0 0; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; color: #78350f; font: 400 0.75rem/1.5 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: A chat row in the nav rail. Active = blue tint; inactive hover = neutral wash.
components.html: แก้บั๊ก compatรีวิว PR
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; width: 16rem; padding: 0.5rem; background: #f9fafb; } .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: #111827; font: 400 0.875rem/1.4 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #e5e7eb; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #dbeafe; color: #1e3a8a; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #60a5fa; }

narrative.overview: A chat app first and an operator's console second, both true at once. In front: a clean, friendly conversation surface in the lineage of Claude.ai and ChatGPT, the message stream is the page and everything else recedes. Behind it: a real console that can run an agent which reads, writes, and executes on the host, reachable from a phone on the LAN or a stranger on a tunnel, so the design never lets the power go invisible. The palette is restrained by intent: a near-white canvas, white surfaces, one blue that means primary/selection/focus and nothing decorative, a disciplined gray ramp for text, with amber for agent activity and red for danger. Type is a single system sans at a fixed rem scale with a monospace channel for copy/paste material. Surfaces are flat at rest and earn shadow only as they rise off the page.
keyCharacteristics: Chat foreground, console background: the conversation dominates; power stays legible, never loud.
One blue, used only for intent (primary action, selection, focus), never decoration.
Meaningful color only: amber = agent activity, red = danger, blue = intent.
Fixed rem type scale, system sans, with a monospace channel for copy/paste material.
Flat by default; elevation rises with the component (border to shadow-sm to shadow-lg to shadow-xl).
Legibility is non-negotiable: every text/background pair clears WCAG AA.

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one accent hue. Blue marks intent (primary action), selection (current chat), and focus (keyboard ring), and is forbidden as decoration. If a blue rectangle is not clickable, selected, or focused, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Floor Rule
rules.body: #6b7280 (Faint) is the lightest gray any text may use. #9ca3af and below are for non-text only. Text on tint follows the same AA bar as text on white.

rules.name: The 12px Floor Rule
rules.body: 0.75rem (12px) is the smallest type in the system. Sub-12px sizes are prohibited; they fail the readable-text floor and the mobile audience who use the QR/harness panel.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Copy Rule
rules.body: Monospace is reserved for literal copy/paste strings (tokens, URLs, cwd, tool JSON). Never use it for emphasis or flavor.

rules.name: The Earned-Shadow Rule
rules.body: A surface gets a shadow only when it has physically left the page (a floating card, a drawer, a modal). Flat inline content uses a hairline border, never a shadow.

dos: Do keep every text/background pair at WCAG AA — body >= 4.5:1, large/bold >= 3:1, placeholders at the same 4.5:1. When a gray is even close, step it toward Ink.
Do keep #6b7280 (Faint) as the lightest text, on white and on tint alike. #9ca3af and below are non-text only.
Do keep type at 12px and up; the people using the QR/harness panel are often on a phone.
Do give every interactive element a visible 2px Focus Ring (#60a5fa) and a working keyboard path; icon-only controls get an aria-label.
Do keep touch targets >= 44x44px on the mobile surface; reveal row actions on focus and touch, not hover alone.
Do reserve monospace for literal copy/paste strings (tokens, URLs, cwd, tool JSON).
Do let color mean one thing: blue = intent, amber = agent activity, red = danger.
Do keep transitions in the 150-250ms band with ease-out; honor prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't ship the generic AI SaaS look: no cream/sand/parchment backgrounds, no identical card grids, no gradient text, no tracked-uppercase eyebrow over every panel, no hero-metric template.
Don't go gaudy or motion-heavy: no full-saturation accents at rest, no decorative animation that doesn't convey state, no glassmorphism, no bounce/elastic easing.
Don't go cramped or sluggish: no dense unreadable text, no muted gray on tinted near-white, no transition slow enough to make the operator wait.
Don't put gray text on a colored fill; use white or a tint of the fill's own hue.
Don't use blue except for intent/selection/focus. A non-interactive blue rectangle is a bug.
Don't rely on hover-only affordances for primary row actions; they vanish on touch and for keyboard users.
Don't drop below the 44px touch target or the 12px type floor for any interactive or text-bearing element.
